description: Lands Awakened Patch 2 (20 December 2021) — Crystal Spider Spawn Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Crystal Spider Spawn Changes

items.text: Crystal Spiders can now spawn directly in the open world

subitems.text: Previously only spawned via lesser mobs being upgraded
Not enough mobs were reaching this stage, resulting in less global Might gain than intended
The overall number in the world should now be higher as a result of this change

sections.searchable_text: Crystal Spider Spawn Changes Crystal Spiders can now spawn directly in the open world Previously only spawned via lesser mobs being upgraded Not enough mobs were reaching this stage, resulting in less global Might gain than intended The overall number in the world should now be higher as a result of this change

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Holy Flash (all Holy Staffs) Energy Cost: 4.2 → 8 Cooldown: 3s → 3.5s

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Mighty Blow (Broadsword) Removed the Damage Resistance Buff

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Holy Staffs Holy Flash (all Holy Staffs) Swords Mighty Blow (Broadsword)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where guild logo colors could alter coloring of mounts
Fixed an issue where building placement was partially blocked in Real Estate plots in Outlands Towns (Rests)
Fixed an issue where trying to enter a Hideout while still on Cluster Queue cooldown showed the wrong error message
Fixed an issue where studying T2 items cost Silver but used no nutrition
Fixed an issue where crafting T1 and T2 items consumed building nutrition
Killing the T8 Avalonian Construct now contributes to the "In a League of Their Own" achievement as intended
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
